figures.caption: Fig. 3. Explainability analysis for three test patients. Each row shows the prediction, GradCAM++ overlay and heatmap, and Occlusion overlay and heatmap.

Fig. 2. Infiltration risk map predictions for two BraTS 2020 test patients. Each row shows the FLAIR image, ground truth, and InfiltrNet prediction. Green: low risk (>20 mm), yellow: medium risk (10–20 mm), red: high risk (<10 mm).
Fig. 1. Overview of the InfiltrNet architecture.
